name: Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate weekly sales pipeline reports instead of manual spreadsheet tracking.
problem_solved: Manual reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
